name: Blakenshipper
description:
This strange instrument is both played and worn, consisting of a set of pipes on a metal arm attached to a harness, a horn, a drum attached to a foot pedal, arm bellows, various keys, cymbals, and more esoteric elements. The blakenshipper grants you a +1 item bonus to Performance checks while playing music with the instrument.

Activate—Be the Band 3 (auditory, concentrate, manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You work double-time, playing an entire band's composition yourself, bolstering those around you by your mighty effort. You and all allies within a gain 15 temporary Hit Points that last for 1 round. For the next minute, you can Sustain to continue the music, granting you and all allies within a 5 temporary Hit Points that last for 1 round; this Sustain action gains the auditory and manipulate traits.
